name: Pipeline Snapshot
description: See whether this quarter's number is going to land, and exactly which deals carry the weight.
alsoSurfaces: What's our committed vs. best-case vs. closed pipeline this quarter?
Which deals are anchoring the forecast?
How does coverage compare to the same point last quarter?
Where do we stand against the 3x coverage rule?
beforeWeRun: Quarter scope — current, next, or rolling 90 days?
Include closed-won YTD in coverage math?

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Closed-won, commit, best-case, total pipeline, coverage ratio with WoW deltas.

whatYoullGet.name: Top 25 deals
whatYoullGet.desc: Deals with the largest committed value, ranked.

whatYoullGet.name: Pipeline by stage
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart of pipeline distribution across funnel stages.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage vs. last quarter
whatYoullGet.desc: Same-week comparison to last quarter's coverage trajectory.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your pipeline snapshot in ~8 min.
